text.title: Continuous Delivery Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Continuous Delivery end-to-end. Each step has named input, action, and output. Decision gates reference rules from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: audit-current-pipeline
step.action: List every manual step in the current pipeline; rank by frequency and risk.

step.name: automate-build-test-deploy
step.action: Replace manual steps with automation (terraform/k8s manifests/argo-rollouts) one at a time; pair each with a smoke test.

step.name: install-expand-contract-gate
step.action: Add a CI gate that rejects migrations dropping columns or renaming tables without the expand-contract phasing.

step.name: wire-rollback-steps
step.action: Add `if: failure()` rollback to every deploy job; test rollback in staging quarterly (r6).

step.name: install-flag-hygiene
step.action: Add owner + expiry as required fields on every flag; weekly job warns on stale flags.

section.title: Decision gates
section.p: Between steps, consult `content/06-decision-tree.xml` if the observed signal does not match expected output. The decision tree always terminates at a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` or at `skip-this-methodology`.
